top_signals.title: FedEx, China Southern Airlines to explore cargo cooperation
top_signals.summary:
FedEx and China Southern Cargo promise to work together on finding joint cargo efficiencies.

The post FedEx, China Southern Airlines to explore cargo cooperation appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Private Credit Performance Defies Media Gloom, Arcmont CEO Says
top_signals.summary: Institutional investors are showing faith in private credit even as retail money gets spooked, since default rates in portfolios remain low, according to Anthony Fobel, chief executive officer of Arcmont Asset Management.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: Oxford University discloses data breach after careers platform hack
top_signals.summary: The University of Oxford disclosed a new data breach last week after being informed by its third-party provider, Group GTI, that its CareerConnect career services platform had been compromised. [...]
